item.title: Standardize error handling — functions log+return, only main exits
item.intent: Establish and enforce a consistent error handling convention: all functions use log_error + return 1 (never exit 1), only the main entry point and truly fatal pre-flight checks may call exit
steps: Audit all exit 1 calls in functions (not main) and determine which should be return 1
Convert inappropriate exit 1 calls to return 1 with proper log_error
Add log_error to any bare return 1 calls that silently fail
Document the convention in a comment near the error handling functions
acceptanceCriteria: No function other than main entry point or pre-flight checks uses exit 1
Every return 1 is preceded by a log_error call
